query:
INSERT INTO tachyon_apps_auth.users (id, username, name, email, image, role, metadata, created_at, updated_at)
            VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)
            ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE
            username = VALUES(username),
            name = VALUES(name),
            email = VALUES(email),
            image = VALUES(image),
            role = VALUES(role),
            metadata = VALUES(metadata),
            updated_at = VALUES(updated_at)
